what_it_does: Automatically polls Shopify for the last 30 days of orders, totals sales by product, creates a top 30 bestsellers list, and updates a collection in your Shopify catalog.
pain_it_solves: Eliminates manual tracking of sales data, spreadsheet manipulation, and the tedious process of manually updating bestseller collections every month.
outcome: Your Shopify store always features an accurate, automatically-updated bestsellers collection based on real sales data from the last 30 days.
opener_hook_draft: Manually tracking your bestsellers and updating collections every month wastes hours you don't have.
bespoke_opener_full: Manually tracking your bestsellers and updating collections every month wastes hours you don't have. This is how our Shopify Top 30 automation keeps your bestseller collection accurate without touching a spreadsheet. In the next 60 seconds, I'll show you exactly how it works.
